title: Senior Software Engineer - PhonePe - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - PhonePe - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
